details.title: \textbf{Job Portal Platform}
descriptions: Built a tech-focused job portal that connects candidates with strong opportunities.
Added automated job scraping so the platform surfaces fresh roles from employers such as Amazon, Google, and Atlassian.
Started as a personal project to track hiring trends in real time and aggregate the latest jobs from the web.
details.scale: Tech job portal with AI-powered matching and automation

details.title: \textbf{Lead Outreach Funnel}
descriptions: Led the product from scratch to a self-sustaining state that generates leads and revenue.
Developed an outreach funnel that increased engagement and revenue using AI-powered outreach with analytics.
details.effect: Scaled from \textbf{0 to 20K+ monthly revenue} with efficient lead outreach

details.title: \textbf{Sellers Automation}
descriptions: Introduced a seller content classification system to automate content creation and quality control.
details.effect: Serving \textbf{30K+} sellers with AI-powered content creation and quality control

details.title: \textbf{Amazon Scraping Integration}
descriptions: Bypassed Amazon scraping defenses to ingest reviews, content, and listing data at scale.
details.effect: Serving \textbf{30K+} products—richer data improved seller reachability

details.title: \textbf{Automated Resume \& Portfolio System}
descriptions: Built an automated system that generates multiple resume variants and a portfolio website from JSON.
Implemented LuaTeX-based PDF generation with custom LaTeX templates for professional resumes.
Integrated the Jekyll static site generator to build and deploy the portfolio from the same data.
Eliminated manual resume updates—edit JSON once to regenerate all resume variants and the site.
details.languages: Stack:- LuaTeX, LaTeX, Jekyll, Ruby, Lua, JSON
details.scale: Single source of truth generating \textbf{4 resume variants + portfolio website}
